title: Cleavage assay
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"7qi8d","text":"Cleavage assay to validate for Cas12a activity ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"filr","text":"Reagents","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3fh75","text":"Cas12a","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"d89d","text":"crRNA","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9agsa","text":"target DNA (U94)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5hbp1","text":"reaction buffer ( PBS (pH 7.5), 150 mM KCl, 10 mM MgCl2, 1% glycerol and 0.5  mM DTT)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sup","offset":54,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":54,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Add the following solution to the tube and gently mix by pipetting. A B 1 COMPONENT VOLUME (µl) 2 Cas12a 4 3 crRNA 5 4 reaction buffer 7 5 Total Volume 16 If the crRNA or Cas12a solution was not added to the reaction as a negative control, the reaction buffer for it was added and the total volume was adjusted to 20 μl.
Check for cleavage by1.5% agarose gel electrophoresis.
Add 4μl of U94 solution to each tube.
creator: Yuichiroh Ikagawa
